summary: Frontend testing for auction card stability fix. All features working correctly: cards maintain stable positions during timer updates, timers display in HH:MM:SS format, filter buttons work, real-time price/bidder updates work without card movement.

card_stability_30s_observation.evidence: Observed auction grid for 35+ seconds. All 12 tracked cards maintained their grid positions while timers counted down and prices updated. Cards only shift when an auction expires and is removed from grid (expected behavior).

card_stability_15s_comparison.evidence: 8/8 cards maintained exact same position after 15 seconds. Cards tracked: Sony PlayStation 5, DJI Mini 4 Pro, Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB, iRobot Roomba j9+, Dyson V15 Detect #35, Fitbit Sense 3 #21, Apple MacBook Air M3 #11, LED Strip 5m RGB

timer_format_hh_mm_ss.evidence: 137 valid timers found, 0 invalid. All timers in HH:MM:SS format (e.g., 00:00:03, 00:00:10, 00:00:02). No malformed timer displays.

expired_auction_removal.evidence: Expired auctions (00:00:00) are removed from grid. During final test, 0 expired auctions were visible. Code filters out auctions with timeLeft > -5000ms (5 second buffer for refresh).

filter_buttons.evidence: All 6 filter buttons working: Live (155), Anfänger (12), Gratis (3), Nacht (17), Ende (0), VIP (20). Each filter correctly shows filtered auction count.

realtime_price_updates.evidence: Prices update in real-time via WebSocket without causing card position changes. Sample prices: € 0,75, € 0,11, € 0,24, € 0,46, € 0,55

realtime_bidder_updates.evidence: Bidder names update in real-time. Sample bidders: Laura G., Max M., Nina P., David W., Elias M.

auction_of_the_day.evidence: AOTD section displays correctly with Razer Blade 16 product, golden gradient styling, crown icon.

new_auction_insertion.evidence: Code correctly inserts new auctions (from auto-restart) in sorted position. Night auctions go to bottom, others sorted by end_time (soonest first).

stable_sorting_implementation.implementation: Uses useRef (stableOrderRef) to maintain card order across renders. Initial sort by end_time, then maintains stable positions. New auctions inserted in correct sorted position.

live_timer_component.implementation: Isolated LiveTimer component with useEffect interval (1000ms). Updates display without re-rendering parent card. Shows 00:00:00 when expired.

websocket_updates.implementation: WebSocket only updates price, bidder, and end_time fields. Does not trigger full re-sort, preserving card positions.

critical_code_review_comments: stableOrderRef (line 729) correctly maintains card order using useRef - persists across renders
gridAuctions useMemo (line 733-811) only re-sorts when filter changes, otherwise maintains stable order
Expired auctions filtered with 5-second buffer (timeLeft > -5000) to prevent premature removal
New auctions from auto-restart correctly inserted in sorted position without disrupting existing cards
LiveTimer component (line 164-205) is memoized and updates independently without causing parent re-render
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card stability fix verified working. Key implementation: useRef (stableOrderRef) at line 729 maintains card order. Cards only move when: 1) Filter changes (resets order), 2) Auction expires and is removed, 3) New auction inserted from auto-restart. Timer, price, and bidder updates happen without card movement. All filter buttons (Live, Anfänger, Gratis, Nacht, Ende, VIP) working correctly.
